## Verification gate (CONTRIBUTING.md — all must be true before ready)

- [ ] `npm test` + `npm run build` green locally; CI green
- [ ] Live drive: console clean except known-benign warns
- [ ] Milestone exit only: verify-kit sweep (5 viewpoints, hash, fps ≥55)
- [ ] Tone/lighting changes have same-viewpoint before/after pairs
- [ ] Gallery updated (screenshots/GIFs + GALLERY.md lines)
- [ ] ART.md respected; no silent fallbacks introduced
